name: Marathoner
description: Earned by riding a session window to its cap or sustaining near-continuous usage. A pet with this trait works long and deep without pause.

name: Sprinter
description: Earned by intense short bursts of activity with long gaps between sessions. A pet with this trait strikes fast and recovers faster.

name: Polyglot
description: Earned by touching 3 or more languages or file types in one session window. A pet with this trait speaks many tongues fluently.

name: Nightshade
description: Earned when the majority of usage falls after midnight. A pet with this trait thrives in the quiet hours when the rest of the world sleeps.

name: Daybreaker
description: Earned by completing meaningful sessions before 9am. A pet with this trait greets each dawn with energy and purpose.

name: Switcher
description: Earned by changing model IDs mid-session. Rewards adaptability and curiosity — never penalizes loyalty to a single model.

name: Deepdiver
description: Earned by sustaining one long continuous conversation thread. A pet with this trait plunges to unfathomable depths and returns with treasure.

name: Swarm
description: Earned by running many short parallel sessions in a window. A pet with this trait divides and conquers, overwhelming with sheer presence.

name: Polyhost
description: Earned by contributing meaningful usage from 2 or more provider adapters in a single window. A pet with this trait bridges worlds without losing itself.
